violations.text: Dishes and chemicals were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The ceiling in the meat walk in cooler area is in poor repair(chipping paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
